location: Looted from a corpse in a sealed room behind a Stonesword Key Imp Statue seal, near the entrance of Auriza Hero's Grave, Capital Outskirts (east of Leyndell, on the way into Altus Plateau).

source.name: Corpse behind the Imp Statue seal, Auriza Hero's Grave entrance

tactics: From the Outer Wall Battleground grace, head east/southeast through the bear-infested open area to reach the dungeon entrance.
Use a Stonesword Key on the Imp Statue seal just past the entrance grace to unlock the room.
Two Basilisks guard the corpse and can stack Frostbite fast — pull them one at a time rather than fighting both together.
lore: Forged to commemorate Godwyn the Golden, the first demigod to fall, the blade carries the plea of a grieving brother begging him to finally die a true death and be freed from undeath.

builds.name: Anti-undead Faith build
builds.why: D/D/D scaling in Strength/Dexterity/Faith plus a built-in 30% damage bonus against Undead enemies and its Last Rites skill make it a strong niche pick against skeletons and undead-heavy areas.
